abstract: Generate type-safe database access code from annotated SQL files using SQG (SQL Query Generator). Covers the annotation syntax (-- QUERY, -- EXEC, -- MIGRATE, -- BASELINE, -- TABLE :appender, @set, ${var}, modifiers :one / :pluck / :all / :result=), sqg.yaml configuration, all supported generators (TypeScript / Java / Python across SQLite / DuckDB / PostgreSQL, plus DuckDB Arrow), the CLI surface (sqg, sqg init, sqg syntax, sqg --validate, sqg mcp, sqg ui), error codes with remediation, and common workflows (adding queries, bulk-insert appenders, BASELINE + MIGRATE, shared Java result types).
